full_text:
Emperor Chong of Han [Liu Bing] 漢沖帝[劉炳]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Emperor Chong of Han [Liu Bing] (漢沖帝[劉炳]). Ninth Emperor of Eastern Han. Ascended the throne at age one. Reigned less than six months. Emperor Chong of Han [Liu Bing] was an historic figure affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Emperor Chong of Han [Liu Bing] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
